intro: Lazarus Group, APT37 (ScarCruft, InkySquid), and BlackFile were the most frequently observed threat actors across 46 social-engineering articles published between April 8 and April 24, 2026. The coverage spanned cryptocurrency, technology, financial-services, financial services, and hospitality sectors, with victims reported globally, including North America, Europe, the United States, and Canada. The severity mix included 34 high, 11 medium, and 1 informational report.
